programme.title: House Mates
programme.desc: Newly married Karthik and Anu buy an old apartment and begin their life. They see strange events, suspect a haunting, but uncover a shocking truth.

programme.title: Mahavatar Narsimha
programme.desc: It brilliantly brings to life the legendary story of Prahlad Maharaja and Lord Narsimha in a way that is both emotionally stirring and visually stunning.

programme.title: Savi
programme.desc: Savi a simple housewife attempts a daring jailbreak to get her husband out of one of England's high security prisons With 400 inmates, 75 armed guards, 60 surveillance cameras.

programme.title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 3
programme.desc: Rooh Baba ventures into a haunted Kolkata estate, confronting two vengeful spirits, each claiming to be the notorious Manjulika.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: A modern Robin Hood switches from stealing to protecting when circumstances make him the reluctant bodyguard of a high-profile client.

programme.title: Eleven
programme.desc: A brave and able officer with a solid record of solving tough cases is allotted to a new, more challenging serial killing inquiry.

programme.title: Amigos
programme.desc: When a man discovers his two doppelgangers online, he finds new connections in life and love - but danger lurks when a hidden criminal past emerges.

programme.title: Rebel Raja
programme.desc: Vishnu, the owner of a greeting card company, falls in love with Keerthi who is overprotective. However, her peculiar nature creates a rift between the two of them.

programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo attends his nephew's wedding and as the couple get ready to leave on their honeymoon, the bride disappears; Columbo investigates and suspects his nephew may have made a few enemies on the police force.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a hit-and-run, followed by a car explosion.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Two women kill their two-timing lover but have solid alibis; one of the women tries to seduce Columbo to keep him off her trail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a case involving argumentative radio talk show host Fielding Chase.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is put on the case of a man who murders his brother.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo matches wits with a forensics specialist, helping his girlfriend to frame her husband for a stockbroker's murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The inimitable cop must prove that a flamboyant Hollywood gossip reporter was murdered by her former lover.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter in the Los Angeles rave scene.

programme.title: Prescription: murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist uses a patient, he is having an affair with to help him kill his wife. His perfect alibi may come apart at the hands of a seemingly befuddled LAPD lieutenant.

programme.title: Ransom for a Dead Man
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo (Peter Falk) outwits a lawyer (Lee Grant) who has killed her husband but made it look like a kidnapping.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: No body, no weapon and a witness courted by the war hero she thinks committed murder, complicate a case.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is caught in a case of stolen art and murder with evidence pointing to an innocent woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A competition between bitter siblings for ownership of a family-owned corporation, after their father's untimely death, escalates into murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An explosion kills an executive as he calls his wife from a car phone, and suspicion falls on a company attorney.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo excavates the area surrounding the newly poured foundation of a building to search for a corpse.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A botanical collector involves his nephew in a kidnapping to break a trust fund, then murders him to finance his hobby.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The mistress of a conductor becomes a target for murder after threatening to tell all to her lover's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A football-team manager (Robert Culp) establishes an electronic alibi for the murder of the team owner (Dean Stockwell) during a game; guests Valerie Harper, Susan Howard, James Gregory, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo journeys to London to observe Scotland Yard, but winds up investigating murders committed by two Shakespearean actors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The ongoing feud between an out-of-favor Hollywood actress and a gossip columnist results in murder. Guest star: Anne Baxter.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A surgeon kills a nurse who suspects him of intentionally botching the heart surgery of his colleague, a cardiac expert.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An American chess champion plays a private match with his challenger and kills him because the man is a better player.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Twins (Martin Landau in a dual role) kill their wealthy uncle just before his marriage to a younger woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cosmetics manufacturer is suspected of murdering an employee (Martin Sheen) who stole a wrinkle-removing formula.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A wine connoisseur kills his playboy brother to prevent his selling the family winery to expiate his latest scandal.

programme.title: The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
programme.desc: A boy (Scott Sealey) upset by his parents' divorce must also tell the sheriff his father (Kerwin Mathews) is a werewolf.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein (Colin Clive) creates a hissing, frizzy-haired female (Elsa Lanchester) for his other monster (Boris Karloff).","large":"After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: The Brides of Dracula
programme.desc: Van Helsing (Peter Cushing) drives a stake through the heart of a vampire baron (David Peel) who even bites his own mother (Martita Hunt).

programme.title: The Car
programme.desc: A Western deputy sheriff (James Brolin) chases a driverless black car that keeps running people down.","large":"Two bicyclists are run down by a strange black car in the desert near a small town in Utah. But this is just the first in a series of hit-and-run murders. Sheriff Wade Parents (James Brolin) is called in to investigate, and his deputy, Everett (John Marley), is killed by the black sedan, which, some witnesses say, has no one behind its wheel. When the car threatens a local school parade, the lives of the town's children and Wade's teacher girlfriend, Lauren (Kathleen Lloyd), are endangered.

programme.title: Creature From the Black Lagoon
programme.desc: Fossil hunters (Richard Carlson, Julia Adams, Richard Denning) encounter a dangerous, humanlike amphibian in the Amazon.","large":"Remnants of a mysterious animal have come to light in a remote jungle, and a group of scientists intends to determine if the find is an anomaly or evidence of an undiscovered beast. To accomplish their goal, the scientists (Antonio Moreno, Richard Carlson, Richard Denning, Whit Bissell) must brave the most perilous pieces of land South America has to offer. But the terrain is nothing compared to the danger posed by an otherworldly being that endangers their work and their lives.

programme.title: The Creature Walks Among Us
programme.desc: Scientists (Jeff Morrow, Rex Reason) capture the creature from the black lagoon and turn him into an air breather.

programme.title: Curse of the Undead
programme.desc: A cow-town preacher (Eric Fleming) shoots a custom bullet at a vampire gunfighter (Michael Pate) in the Old West.

programme.title: The Curse of the Werewolf
programme.desc: The son of a servant assaulted by a beggar becomes a wolfman in 18th-century Spain.

programme.title: Curucu, Beast of the Amazon
programme.desc: A doctor (Beverly Garland) and an adventurer (John Bromfield) head for the Amazon, where a guy (Tom Payne) in a bird suit is scaring natives.

programme.title: The Deadly Mantis
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Craig Stevens) and a paleontologist (William Hopper) track a huge praying mantis from the North Pole to Manhattan.

programme.title: Dr. Cyclops
programme.desc: A mad doctor (Albert Dekker) in Peru reduces a woman (Janice Logan) and three men to one-fifth their normal size.","large":"To assist with his work due to his failing eyesight, renowned biologist Dr. Alexander Thorkel invites two prominent scientists and a mineralogist to his hidden Amazon jungle laboratory. Thorkel remains evasive about the nature of his experiments, and after the team evaluates his bacteria slides, he orders them away. When they refuse, Thorkel and his servant trick them into a chamber where Thorkel shrinks them down to microscopic size, and they escape to the terrifying jungle.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: A real-estate man (Dwight Frye) visits the Transylvania castle of a 500-year-old vampire (Bela Lugosi).","large":"The dashing, mysterious Count Dracula (Bela Lugosi), after hypnotizing a British soldier, Renfield (Dwight Frye), into his mindless slave, travels to London and takes up residence in an old castle. Soon Dracula begins to wreak havoc, sucking the blood of young women and turning them into vampires. When he sets his sights on Mina (Helen Chandler), the daughter of a prominent doctor, vampire-hunter Van Helsing (Edward Van Sloan) is enlisted to put a stop to the count's never-ending bloodlust.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: Van Helsing (Laurence Olivier) investigates as the vampire count (Frank Langella) scales walls and visits bedrooms at an English manor.","large":"A man washes ashore in England after a shipwreck and is found by Mina Van Helsing (Jan Francis). The man introduces himself as Count Dracula (Frank Langella) of Transylvania, and proceeds to integrate himself into the lives of Mina and her friend Lucy Seward (Kate Nelligan). However, when Mina dies and her father, Prof. Van Helsing (Laurence Olivier), attributes her death to a vampire, evidence indicates that Count Dracula is the monster, and Lucy is his next target.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: This was made at night using the same sets and script as the Bela Lugosi classic but with a Spanish cast.","large":"Soon after beginning work for Conde Dracula (Carlos Villarias), the clerk Renfield (Pablo Alvarez Rubio) learns that his employer is, in fact, a vampire who lives on human blood. Now under Dracula's spell, Renfield helps his master travel to London, where the vampire takes another victim (Carmen Guerrero). Dracula also has eyes on the lovely Eva (Lupita Tovar), but her fiancé, Juan Harker (Barry Norton), and a wise professor named Van Helsing (Eduardo Arozamena) seek to stop him.

programme.title: Dracula's Daughter
programme.desc: A vampire countess (Gloria Holden) in black falls in love with a psychologist (Otto Kruger) and kidnaps his fiancée (Marguerite Churchill).","large":"Although Count Dracula was destroyed by Van Helsing (Edward Van Sloan), who is now being tried for his murder, Dracula's daughter, the Countess Marya Zaleska (Gloria Holden), is still alive -- and her father's death has brought her no closer to eradicating her vampiric thirst for blood. When attempts to free herself of the disease fail, she turns to psychiatrist Dr. Garth (Otto Kruger) for assistance, but soon finds herself struggling with the desire to make him one of the undead as well.

programme.title: The Evil of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron (Peter Cushing) and a hypnotist (Peter Woodthorpe) bring the creature out of ice, horrifying villagers of Karlsbad.","large":"Dr. Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) returns destitute to his home village to recommence his experimental research into the reanimation of dead tissue, and stumbles upon his old monster suspended in ice. Though he revives the creature, Frankenstein must seek the help of hypnotist Zoltan (Peter Woodthorpe) to repair its mind. Zoltan then assumes control of the monster, using him to wreak havoc. But when Frankenstein tries to regain power over his creation, he becomes Zoltan's next target.

programme.title: Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein creates a monster from cadavers and a killer's brain.

programme.title: Frankenstein Meets the Wolfman
programme.desc: Tormented werewolf Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney Jr.) calls on Dr. Frankenstein and finds his monster (Bela Lugosi) instead.","large":"Lawrence Stewart Talbot (Lon Chaney Jr.) is plagued by a physical oddity that turns him into a crazed werewolf after sundown. His desire to rid himself of this ailment leads him to the castle owned by mad scientist Dr. Frankenstein. Frankenstein, it turns out, is now dead, yet Talbot believes that the scientist's daughter, Baroness Elsa Frankenstein (Ilona Massey), can help him. However, his quest to right himself puts him on a collision course with Frankenstein's monster (Bela Lugosi).

programme.title: The Frozen Ghost
programme.desc: When famous radio hypnotist Alex Gregor (Lon Chaney Jr.) accidentally causes the death of an audience member during a broadcast, his guilt leads him to break off his engagement to Maura Daniel (Evelyn Ankers) and take a job at a wax museum.","large":"When famous radio hypnotist Alex Gregor (Lon Chaney Jr.) accidentally causes the death of an audience member during a broadcast, his guilt leads him to break off his engagement to Maura Daniel (Evelyn Ankers) and take a job at a wax museum. Jealousy over the attention paid to his new co-worker causes mentally unbalanced sculptor Rudi Poldan (Martin Kosleck) to lash out at museum owner Valerie Monet (Tala Birell) and her niece Nina (Elena Verdugo) in a horrifying fashion.

programme.title: The Funhouse
programme.desc: Naughty teens (Elizabeth Berridge, Cooper Huckabee, Miles Chapin) are locked in a carnival fun house with a man in a Frankenstein mask.","large":"Rebellious teen Amy (Elizabeth Berridge) defies her parents by going to a trashy carnival that has pulled into town. In tow are her boyfriend, Buzz (Cooper Huckabee), and their friends Liz (Largo Woodruff) and Richie (Miles Chapin). Thinking it would be fun to spend the night in the campy Funhouse horror ride, the teens witness a murder by a deformed worker wearing a mask. Locked in, Amy and her friends must evade the murderous carnival workers and escape before it leaves town the next day.

programme.title: The Ghost of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Shepherd Igor rescues the monster from a sulfur pit and brings him to Dr. Frankenstein's other son.

programme.title: Halloween II
programme.desc: A killer follows his injured target (Jamie Lee Curtis) to the hospital on Oct. 31 in Haddonfield, Ill.","large":"After failing to kill stubborn survivor Laurie (Jamie Lee Curtis) and taking a bullet or six from former psychiatrist Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), Michael Myers (Jonathan Prince) has followed Laurie to the Haddonfield Memorial Hospital, where she's been admitted for Myers' attempt on her life. The institution proves to be particularly suited to serial killers, however, as Myers cuts, stabs and slashes his way through hospital staff to reach his favorite victim.

programme.title: House of Dracula
programme.desc: A scientist (Onslow Stevens) helps the Wolf Man (Lon Chaney) and Dracula (John Carradine), and revives Frankenstein's monster.","large":"This monster movie focuses on the iconic vampire, Count Dracula (John Carradine), and Lawrence Talbot (Lon Chaney), better known as the Wolf Man. Both beings of the night are tired of their supernatural afflictions, so they seek out Dr. Franz Edelmann (Onslow Stevens) for cures for their respective curses. While trying to aid the imposing creatures, Edelmann himself develops a transformative condition, adding to the many ghouls lurking around the foreboding landscape.

programme.title: House of Frankenstein
programme.desc: A mad doctor (Boris Karloff) and his hunchbacked helper (J. Carrol Naish) revive Dracula, the Wolf Man (Lon Chaney) and the Frankenstein monster.","large":"After escaping from prison, the evil Dr. Niemann (Boris Karloff) and his hunchbacked assistant, Daniel (J. Carrol Naish), plot their revenge against those who imprisoned them. For this, they recruit the powerful Wolf Man (Lon Chaney), Frankenstein's monster (Glenn Strange) and even Dracula himself (John Carradine). Niemann pursues those who wrong him, sending each monster out to do his dirty work. But his control on the monsters is weak at best and may prove to be his downfall.

programme.title: House of Horrors
programme.desc: An insane sculptor sends the disfigured criminal he saved from drowning to kill the critics who denounced him.

programme.title: The Incredible Shrinking Man
programme.desc: Exposure to a mysterious fog causes a man (Grant Williams) to shrink, making the world around him extremely hazardous.","large":"While on a boating trip, Scott Carey (Grant Williams) is exposed to a radioactive cloud. Nothing seems amiss at first, but several months later Scott realizes that he's shrunk in height by several inches. He sees a doctor, who admits that he's baffled. As Scott continues to shrink, decreasing to three feet tall, he becomes bitter, and lashes out at his wife, Louise (Randy Stuart). He begins to fear a cure will never be found -- since even as he becomes a national sensation, he's still shrinking.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: The serum that makes a scientist (Claude Rains) invisible has madness as a side effect.

programme.title: The Invisible Man Returns
programme.desc: A man (Vincent Price) framed for murder uses a serum to become invisible, then escapes to find the killer.","large":"Wrongly accused of murdering his brother, Geoffrey Radcliffe (Vincent Price) is found guilty and sentenced to die. But when sympathetic Dr. Griffin (John Sutton) injects him with a serum that renders him invisible, Radcliffe is able to escape and search for the real culprit. With Inspector Sampson (Cecil Kellaway) of Scotland Yard hot on his trail, Radcliffe begins to suspect that a recent hire in his family's mining company might have the answers he seeks.

programme.title: The Invisible Man's Revenge
programme.desc: A criminal (Jon Hall) haunts his enemies' mansion after a mad scientist (John Carradine) makes him invisible.

programme.title: The Invisible Ray
programme.desc: A scientist (Bela Lugosi) seeks an antidote for a radium-poisoned colleague (Boris Karloff) with the touch of death.

programme.title: The Invisible Woman
programme.desc: A screwy professor's experiments with a gorgeous model attract the attentions of a gangster and a handsome millionaire.

programme.title: Island of Lost Souls
programme.desc: White-suited Dr. Moreau (Charles Laughton) herds his bestial mutants and plots to mate his panther-woman with a visitor (Richard Arlen).","large":"In this adaptation of H.G. Wells' novel "The Island of Doctor Moreau," Edward Parker (Richard Arlen) is shipwrecked on a remote island presided over by the mysterious Dr. Moreau (Charles Laughton). Edward discovers his host is conducting genetic experiments, and presiding over a race of half-human, half-animal hybrids, including the alluring Panther Woman and the sage Sayer of the Law (Bela Lugosi). The island has become its own society, with Moreau as its god.

programme.title: It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Based on a Ray Bradbury short story about an astronomer's encounter with extraterrestrials in the Arizona desert.","large":"While looking through his telescope one night, John Putnam (Richard Carlson) sees what at first appears to be a meteor shower -- but it is actually a crash-landing alien spaceship! After investigating the crater from the impact, John informs the town sheriff (Charles Drake), and receives nothing but ridicule. Even his fiancée, Ellen (Barbara Rush), is skeptical. All that changes when the townsfolk start disappearing, and are replaced by eerie alien duplicates.

programme.title: Kiss of the Vampire
programme.desc: A professor (Clifford Evans) in black rescues stranded 1910 newlyweds from a Bavarian doctor's (Noel Willman) vampire villa.

programme.title: The Mad Doctor of Market Street
programme.desc: A fugitive doctor (Lionel Atwill) tries to raise the dead for South Sea Islanders.

programme.title: The Mad Ghoul
programme.desc: A mad scientist (George Zucco) turns his assistant (David Bruce) into a zombie as part of a plan to steal his assistant's lover (Evelyn Ankers).

programme.title: Man-Made Monster
programme.desc: A mad scientist (Lionel Atwill) makes an electric man (Lon Chaney Jr.) who glows and must wear a rubber suit.

programme.title: The Monster and the Girl
programme.desc: A mad scientist creates a monster when he transplants the brain of an executed murderer into the body of an ape.

programme.title: Monster on the Campus
programme.desc: A professor turns into a Neanderthal killer after injecting himself with the blood of an ancient fish.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: An Egyptian mummy (Boris Karloff) searches Cairo for the girl (Zita Johann) he thinks is his long-lost princess.","large":"A team of British archaeologists led by Sir Joseph Whemple discover the mummified remains of the ancient Egyptian prince Imhotep, along with the legendary scroll of Thoth. When one of the archaeologists recites the scroll aloud, Imhotep returns to life, but escapes. Several years later, Imhotep has taken on the guise of a wealthy man, as he searches Egypt for his lost love, who he believes has been reincarnated as the lovely Helen Grosvenor.

programme.title: The Mummy's Curse
programme.desc: A mummy (Lon Chaney Jr.) and his princess (Virginia Christine) roam the Louisiana bayou.

programme.title: The Mummy's Ghost
programme.desc: A 3000-year-old limping mummy (Lon Chaney) seeks his reincarnated princess (Ramsay Ames) in a Midwestern college town.

programme.title: The Mummy's Hand
programme.desc: Archaeologists defile the tomb of mummified Kharis, who was buried alive for falling in love with an Egyptian princess.","large":"In Cairo, archaeologist Steve Banning (Dick Foran) unearths a vase that he believes could lead him to the ancient tomb of Princess Ananka. Unknown to Steve, his colleague, Professor Andoheb (George Zucco), is also the High Priest of Karnak who holds the secrets of Karas, a mummy who guards Ananka's tomb. Upon receiving funds from magician Solvani (Cecil Kellaway) and his daughter, Marta (Peggy Moran), Steve and the Solvanis embark on an expedition to the grave site, where Karas awaits.

programme.title: The Mummy's Tomb
programme.desc: Old archaeologist (Dick Foran) recalls mummy (Lon Chaney) at large in New England.

programme.title: Night Creatures
programme.desc: Pirate Captain Clegg (Peter Cushing), an English vicar by day, leads ghostly mounted smugglers by night.

programme.title: Night Monster
programme.desc: A man (Lionel Atwill) uses mind over matter to replace his legs, then hunts the doctors who took them.

programme.title: The Night Walker
programme.desc: A lawyer (Robert Taylor) advises a blind man's rich widow (Barbara Stanwyck) tormented by nightmares.

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: Hoping to find a fortune in gold, a boy instead discovers the horrific secrets lurking inside the home of two murderous siblings.","large":"When young Fool (Brandon Adams) breaks into the home of his family's greedy and uncaring landlords, he discovers a disturbing scenario where incestuous adult siblings have mutilated a number of boys and kept them imprisoned under stairs in their large, creepy house. As Fool attempts to flee before the psychopaths can catch him, he meets their daughter, Alice (A.J. Langer), who has been spared any extreme discipline by her deranged parents. Can Fool and Alice escape before it's too late?

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Claude Rains) rises from the Paris sewers to boost his favorite opera understudy's (Susanna Foster) career.","large":"Talented Christine (Susanna Foster) is unaware that her singing lessons are being funded by a secret admirer, Enrique (Claude Rains), a mysterious violinist with a disfigured face. Christine's colleagues become suspicious when mysterious accidents start occurring at the Paris Opera House, as the deaths coincide with her meteoric rise to stardom. Christine's suitors, Raoul (Edgar Barrier) and Anatole (Nelson Eddy), brave the dark recesses of the opera house to find the true culprit.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: Old friends gather after their freshman year in college to rent a summerhouse on Lake Michigan and chase girls.","large":"After a year apart - attending different schools, meeting different people - the guys rent a beach house and vow to make this the best summer ever. As it turns out, whether that will happen or not has a lot to do with the girls. Between the wild parties, outrageous revelations and yes, a trip to band camp, they discover that times change and people change, but in the end, it's all about sticking together.

programme.title: American Reunion
programme.desc: Jim, Michelle, Stifler, and their friends reunite in East Great Falls, Michigan for their high school reunion.","large":"In the summer of 1999, four small-town Michigan boys began a quest to lose their virginity. In the ensuing years, Jim (Jason Biggs) has married Michelle (Alyson Hannigan), though Kevin (Thomas Ian Nicholas) has left Vicky (Tara Reid). Oz (Chris Klein) has grown apart from Heather (Mena Suvari), but Finch still has the hots for Stiffler's (Seann William Scott) mom (Jennifer Coolidge). These lifelong friends have come home to reminisce about -- and become inspired by -- their former teen selves.

programme.title: American Pie Presents: Band Camp
programme.desc: A lewd teen (Tad Hilgenbrinck) causes mischief when he must attend a camp for musicians.

programme.title: American Pie Presents: Band Camp
programme.desc: A lewd teen (Tad Hilgenbrinck) causes mischief when he must attend a camp for musicians.

programme.title: American Pie Presents: Beta House
programme.desc: Michigan collegians (John White, Jake Siegel) pledge a wild fraternity that has an intense rivalry with another Greek organization.","large":"Freshman Erik Stifler (John White) arrives at college with his longtime friend "Cooze" Coozeman (Jake Siegel). Both freshmen pledge the Beta fraternity and begin a series of often disgusting initiation rituals, climaxing with stealing an object from the house of their rivals, the Geek fraternity. The furious Geek president, Edgar Willis (Tyrone Savage), challenges the Betas to the Greek Games -- a competition that's been banned on campus for 40 years.

programme.title: End of Days
programme.desc: An ex-cop (Arnold Schwarzenegger) must protect a woman chosen by Satan (Gabriel Byrne) to be the mother of the Antichrist.","large":"With the millennium approaching, a series of disturbing signs suggests that Satan (Arnold Schwarzenegger) has returned to Earth and is walking the streets of New York City. It seems that Satan needs to find a woman who will bear his child, as the time for the arrival of the anti-Christ draws near.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: When infertility threatens mankind with extinction, a disillusioned bureaucrat becomes the unlikely champion in the fight for the survival of Earth's population.","large":"When infertility threatens mankind with extinction and the last child born has perished, a disillusioned bureaucrat (Clive Owen) becomes the unlikely champion in the fight for the survival of Earth's population; He must face down his own demons and protect the planet's last remaining hope from danger.

programme.title: Death Race 2
programme.desc: Convicted of killing a cop, an inmate (Luke Goss) competes in a brutal race where cars are deadly weapons.

programme.title: Death Race 3: Inferno
programme.desc: Only one victory away from winning his freedom, legendary driver Carl Lucas (Luke Goss) enters the first Death Race to take place in the brutal Kalahari Desert.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: Los Angeles police officer Brian O'Connor must decide where his loyalty really lies when he becomes enamored with the street racing world he has been sent undercover to destroy.","large":"Dominic Toretto enjoys the adrenaline of street car racing and his fans treat him like a rock star. After a blazing encounter with the ruthless Johnny Tran, Dom decides to take Brian, a newcomer to street racing, under his wing. Dom's sister Mia sees something she likes in Brian, too. Trouble is, neither of them realize he's an undercover cop, and Dominic and his rival Johnny Tran are both the prime suspects in a case involving dirty money and big-rig hijacking.

programme.title: Contraband
programme.desc: A former smuggler (Mark Wahlberg) finds himself back in the game to settle his brother-in-law's debt to a ruthless drug lord (Giovanni Ribisi).","large":"Ex-smuggler Chris Farraday gave up his criminal ways long ago. But, he's forced back into the game after his brother-in-law, Andy, botches a drug deal for a crime lord, leaving Chris to settle the debt. With the help of his best friend, Chris assembles a team to run to Panama to retrieve a fortune in counterfeit bills. When things go awry, Chris must call on his rusty skills to complete the task before his family pays the price.

programme.title: Fighting
programme.desc: A scam artist (Terrence Howard) introduces a young man (Channing Tatum) to New York's bare-knuckle street-fighting circuit.","large":"Shawn MacArthur (Channing Tatum) barely makes a living selling counterfeit goods on the streets of New York. But he has a natural talent for street fighting, which con-man Harvey Boarden (Terrence Howard) wants to put to good use. Forming an uneasy alliance with Boarden, Shawn becomes top dog in the bare-knuckle-brawl circuit, taking down pro boxers, martial artists and ultimate fighters one by one. Shawn wants out of this dark world, but he faces the fight of his life to get there.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: Los Angeles police officer Brian O'Connor must decide where his loyalty really lies when he becomes enamored with the street racing world he has been sent undercover to destroy.","large":"Dominic Toretto enjoys the adrenaline of street car racing and his fans treat him like a rock star. After a blazing encounter with the ruthless Johnny Tran, Dom decides to take Brian, a newcomer to street racing, under his wing. Dom's sister Mia sees something she likes in Brian, too. Trouble is, neither of them realize he's an undercover cop, and Dominic and his rival Johnny Tran are both the prime suspects in a case involving dirty money and big-rig hijacking.

programme.title: Contraband
programme.desc: A former smuggler (Mark Wahlberg) finds himself back in the game to settle his brother-in-law's debt to a ruthless drug lord (Giovanni Ribisi).","large":"Ex-smuggler Chris Farraday gave up his criminal ways long ago. But, he's forced back into the game after his brother-in-law, Andy, botches a drug deal for a crime lord, leaving Chris to settle the debt. With the help of his best friend, Chris assembles a team to run to Panama to retrieve a fortune in counterfeit bills. When things go awry, Chris must call on his rusty skills to complete the task before his family pays the price.

programme.title: Death Race 2
programme.desc: Convicted of killing a cop, an inmate (Luke Goss) competes in a brutal race where cars are deadly weapons.

programme.title: Death Race 3: Inferno
programme.desc: Only one victory away from winning his freedom, legendary driver Carl Lucas (Luke Goss) enters the first Death Race to take place in the brutal Kalahari Desert.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: A psychiatrist (Madeleine Stowe) finally believes a patient (Bruce Willis) who claims to be a time-traveler sent to 1996 to prevent a virulent holocaust.","large":"Traveling back in time isn't simple, as James Cole (Bruce Willis) learns the hard way. Imprisoned in the 2030s, James is recruited for a mission that will send him back to the 1990s. Once there, he's supposed to gather information about a nascent plague that's about to exterminate the vast majority of the world's population. But, aside from the manic Jeffrey (Brad Pitt), he gets little in the way of cooperation, not least from medical gatekeepers like Dr. Kathryn Railly (Madeleine Stowe).

programme.title: The Lonely Guy
programme.desc: A lonely New York bachelor (Steve Martin) learns that he, his buddy (Charles Grodin) and others like them are a distinct social type.","large":"Larry Hubbard (Steve Martin), who pens greeting cards for a living, is lonely after his longtime girlfriend's infidelity leads to the end of their relationship. When not commiserating with fellow loner Warren (Charles Grodin), Larry spends his time pursuing Iris (Judith Ivey), but the relationship seems doomed. Larry decides to channel his feelings into writing a book, which becomes a bestselling guide to the lonely life. Suddenly he's famous -- but all he really wants is to be with Iris.

programme.title: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A Manhattan hotel concierge (Michael J. Fox) woos the mistress (Gabrielle Anwar) of an investor (Anthony Higgins) he needs for a big business deal.","large":"New York concierge Doug Ireland (Michael J. Fox) wants to go into business for himself and refurbish a hotel on Roosevelt Island, N.Y., but he needs an investor. With a few weeks left before his option on the site runs out, Doug agrees to help wealthy Christian Hanover (Anthony Higgins) conceal his affair with salesgirl Andy Hart (Gabrielle Anwar) from his wife. Despite his own attraction to Andy, Doug tries to stay focused on getting Christian to invest $3 million in his project.

programme.title: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: A New Yorker living with four models falls for a neighbor who may be a murderer.

programme.title: For Richer or Poorer
programme.desc: Pursued by an IRS agent, a wealthy Manhattan couple (Tim Allen, Kirstie Alley) flee to Pennsylvania and pose as an Amish man's (Jay O. Sanders) kin.","large":"Brad Sexton (Tim Allen) and his wife, Caroline (Kirstie Alley), are wealthy New Yorkers with both marital and financial problems. The latter issue becomes a pressing matter when they discover that their accountant has embezzled millions and pinned the blame on them. Forced to go on the lam, Brad and Caroline end up in an Amish area of Pennsylvania and decide to pose as members of the religious group to evade the IRS. As the two adapt to the simple Amish lifestyle, they begin to reconnect.

programme.title: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: An angry confrontation evolves into renewed passion for a divorced couple (Bette Midler, Dennis Farina) at their daughter's (Paula Marshall) wedding.","large":"Molly De Mora (Paula Marshall) is getting married, with her beau being Keith Marks (Jamie Denton), a political hopeful who is running on a family values platform. Molly invites her now-divorced parents, Lilly (Bette Midler) and Dan (Dennis Farina), to the ceremony, only to see them rekindle their romance despite the fact both are remarried. Fearing a tabloid scandal that could damage Keith's candidacy, Molly sets out to stop them, but the pair have run off and aren't so easily tracked.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: In Hawaii struggling to get over a bad breakup, a musician (Jason Segel) encounters his former lover and her new boyfriend.","large":"Struggling musician Peter Bretter is better-known as the boyfriend of TV star Sarah Marshall. After she unceremoniously dumps him, he feels lost and alone but makes a last-ditch bid to get over it by going to Hawaii. However, she and her new boyfriend are there in the same hotel.

programme.title: Trainwreck
programme.desc: A promiscuous magazine writer considers monogamy for the first time when she starts to fall in love with the charming sports doctor she's profiling.","large":"Ever since her father drilled into her head that monogamy isn't realistic, magazine writer Amy has made promiscuity her credo. As much as she enjoys an uninhibited life free of commitment, Amy is really in a rut. While writing a profile about charming and successful sports doctor Aaron Conners, she finds herself actually falling in love for the first time, and what's more, Aaron seems to like her too. Amy starts to wonder if it's time to clean up her act.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: As an important presentation nears, a business partner (Vince Vaughn) agonizes over whether to tell his associate and friend (Kevin James) that he saw the man's wife out with another guy.","large":"Longtime friends Ronny (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Kevin James) are partners in an auto-design firm. They are hard at work on a presentation for a dream project that would really launch their company. Then Ronny spots Nick's wife out with another man, and in the process of investigating the possible affair, he learns that Nick has a few secrets of his own. As the presentation nears, Ronny agonizes over what might happen if the truth gets out.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: In Hawaii struggling to get over a bad breakup, a musician (Jason Segel) encounters his former lover and her new boyfriend.","large":"Struggling musician Peter Bretter is better-known as the boyfriend of TV star Sarah Marshall. After she unceremoniously dumps him, he feels lost and alone but makes a last-ditch bid to get over it by going to Hawaii. However, she and her new boyfriend are there in the same hotel.

programme.title: Head Over Heels

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: A commander (Rhona Mitra) and her crew venture into long-quarantined Scotland to find the counteragent to a deadly virus that has re-emerged in London.","large":"When the first outbreak of the Reaper virus hit Scotland, Eden Sinclair was one of the last to escape containment and had to leave her mother behind. Twenty-five years later, Maj. Eden Sinclair (Rhona Mitra) leads a team back into the hot zone to find a counteragent to the virus, which has re-emerged in London. She and her comrades wage a desperate battle for survival against feral survivors, as they try to prevent it from ushering in a new dark age.

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: A teenage assassin (Saoirse Ronan) faces startling revelations about her existence and questions about her humanity as she makes her way across Europe to carry out a hit.","large":"Raised by her father (Eric Bana) in the Finnish wilderness, teenage Hanna (Saoirse Ronan) has trained all her life to be the perfect assassin. Her father sends her on a mission, and she stealthily makes her way across Europe while evading agents sent after her by a ruthless operative named Marissa (Cate Blanchett), who once worked with Hanna's father. As she draws closer to her target, Hanna faces startling revelations about her existence and begins to question her humanity.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: A band of samurai sets out to avenge the death and dishonor of their master at the hands of a ruthless shogun.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: A woman helps an amnesiac, who has a dangerous past, to dodge assassins as he tries to learn about himself.","large":"A man, salvaged, near death, from the ocean by an Italian fishing boat. When he recuperates, the man suffers from total amnesia, without identity or background, except for a range of extraordinary talents in fighting, linguistic skills and self-defense that speak of a dangerous past. He sets out on a desperate search-assisted by the initially rebellious Marie, to discover who he really is, and why he's being lethally pursued by assassins.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: A CIA chief sends a senior operative to take down Jason Bourne when it appears the rogue agent is behind the deaths of two people.","large":"Jason Bourne is living in India when he is framed by Russian agent Kirill for the theft of millions from the CIA; Kirill begins to pursue Bourne, intending to assassinate him -- but while Bourne and his girlfriend, Marie, are on the run, a shot meant for him kills her instead; vowing revenge, Bourne sets out to prove his innocence and bring the culprits to justice, but he has to evade CIA head Pamela Landy, who is convinced he is guilty.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne dodges a ruthless C.I.A. official and his Agents from a new assassination program while searching for the origins of his life as a trained killer.","large":"Jason Bourne (Matt Damon) continues his international quest to uncover his true identity. From Russia to Europe to northern Africa to the United States, he must stay one step ahead of those who would capture or kill him before he has a chance to discover the truth.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: The actions of Jason Bourne spell the possible end of secret intelligence programs, so a specially enhanced operative (Jeremy Renner) goes on the run with a research scientist (Rachel Weisz) when it appears that their lives will become forfeit.","large":"When the actions of Jason Bourne spark a fire that threatens to burn down decades of research across a number of secret intelligence agencies, Eric Byer (Edward Norton), the man who built the programs, decides he must sacrifice one of them: Outcome. Aaron Cross (Jeremy Renner), one of Outcome's six agents, and research scientist Marta Shearing (Rachel Weisz) go on the run when Byer targets them for termination. But Cross proves to be a far deadlier target than Byer realizes.

programme.title: Ittefaq
programme.desc: Dilip Roy is a painter by trade and, despite possessing a beautiful wife called Sushma, he spends most of his time painting. On the day of their anniversary celebration, Dilip is late finishing a painting when a frustrated Sushma snatches the brush from his hand. Furious, Dilip strangles her to death, is arrested and sent to a psychiatric institute.

programme.title: Ek Hi Raasta
programme.desc: Amar and Malti, two orphans, lead a harmonious life with their son, Raja. However, Amar gets murdered and circumstances force Malti to marry Amar's boss, Prakash, which is not accepted by Raja

programme.title: Baazi
programme.desc: A chief minister delegates the task of locating culprits behind a scandal to a police inspector with a reputation for tackling assassins. However, the inspector is framed for murder and must find a way to prove himself innocent.

programme.title: Lajja
programme.desc: The Film follows four women from different backgrounds in India as they unite to fight against misogyny and violence in their society. Forced marriage, domestic abuse, and honor killings are just some of the struggles they face. Through their determination, they discover the strength of the human spirit, inspiring others to join their fight for justice. With a powerful cast and storyline, sheds light on important social issues and the fight for women's rights. Will these women succeed in creating a better future for themselves and future generations?
